web.title: Gemini API Free Tier Complete Guide: Rate Limits, Upgrade ...
web.description:
## When to Upgrade: The Decision Framework
By routing requests to Flash-Lite, you get up to 1,000 requests per day at zero cost, which is more than enough for many legitimate use cases.

## 7 Strategies to Maximize Your Free Tier
On the free tier, where TPM is limited to 250,000, efficient prompts mean more useful requests per minute.

## Frequently Asked Questions
### Is the Gemini API really free?
You get access to models including Gemini 2.5 Pro, Flash, and Flash-Lite with rate limits of 5-15 RPM and 100-1,000 RPD.

web.title: Gemini API Pricing May 2026: 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, 2.5 Lite
web.description:
# Gemini API Pricing (May 2026): Every Model and Tier
## How Much It Costs to Use Gemini
### Gemini Flash Models (2.5 Flash, 2.5 Flash-Lite, 2.0 Flash)
| Tier | Feature | Media Type | Price (per 1M tokens) |
|-|-|-|-|
| **Free** | Input/Output | All | Free of charge |

| Tier | Feature | Media Type | Price (per 1M tokens) |
|-|-|-|-|
| **Free** | Input/Output | All | Free of charge |

## Gemini Pricing vs Competitors (2026)
### Key Gemini API Pricing Insights (May 2026)
Free access is limited to Gemini 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Flash-Lite, 3 Flash, and 3.1 Flash-Lite with reduced daily quotas (1,500 RPD for Flash models, down from previous limits).

| Question | Current answer on June 30, 2026 |
|-|-|
| Is the "20 RPD" free-tier limit real? | It can be real for a specific project or model state, but it is not a safe universal number to copy into code. Read AI Studio for the exact project, model, tier, and billing state. |

web.title: Gemini API Free Tier 2026: Limits, Quotas, and More
web.description:
# Gemini API Free Tier (April 2026): Every Rate Limit, Quota, and Gotcha
## Gemini 3 Flash Free Tier Limits
On the free tier it runs 10 requests per minute, 250,000 tokens per minute, and 1,500 requests per day.

## Gemini App vs. Gemini API: Different Products
### When the Free Tier Breaks Down
At 1,500 requests per day, you run out by early afternoon if your app has steady traffic.
